subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the seas of Thy divine singleness surged forth and shone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به تموجت یمایم عز فردانیتک و اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
